recommendations.title: The Unsaid
recommendations.overview: A doctor dealing with the aftermath of his son's death tries to help a troubled young man.

recommendations.title: Jason Lives - Friday the 13th Part VI
recommendations.overview: Tommy Jarvis, tormented by the fear that maybe Jason isn't really dead, unwittingly resurrects the mass murderer for another bloody rampage.

recommendations.title: Date with an Angel
recommendations.overview: Aspiring composer Jim Sanders is engaged to spoiled rich girl Patty. But the morning after his bachelor party, Jim wakes up to discover a beautiful, broken-winged angel in his pool. When everyone finds out about his heavenly houseguest, Jim must cope

recommendations.title: One Dark Night

recommendations.title: Good Kids
recommendations.overview: Four high school students look to redefine themselves after graduation.

recommendations.title: ParaNorman
recommendations.overview: In the town of Blithe Hollow, Norman Babcock can speak to the dead, but no one other than his eccentric new friend believes his ability is real. One day, Norman's eccentric uncle tells him of a ritual he must perform to protect the town from a curse

recommendations.title: Foxy Brown
recommendations.overview: A voluptuous black woman takes a job as a high-class prostitute in order to get revenge on the mobsters who murdered her boyfriend.

recommendations.title: The Woman in Black
recommendations.overview: A lawyer travels to a small seaside town to settle the estate of a recently deceased woman, but soon becomes ensnared in something much more sinister.

recommendations.title: R.L. Stine's Monsterville: The Cabinet of Souls
recommendations.overview: Teenage friends must resist the spell of an evil showman staging a house of horrors show in their small town.
